title: **The Kind Lady with a Loving Heart**
story:
**The Kind Lady with a Loving Heart**

Good evening, sweet pea! Snuggle close, my little love. Grandpa has a special story for you tonight, about a very kind lady.

Once upon a time, far, far away, there was a lovely lady named Mama Teresa. She wasn't a princess, but she had a heart bigger than the biggest castle! Mama Teresa loved everyone, especially little people who were sad or felt a little lonely.

She saw people who needed a warm hug or a little food. So, what did brave Mama Teresa do? She gave them her sweetest smile! She held their tiny hands and wrapped them in a soft blanket. She would give a little food. Her big love made sad hearts feel so happy and warm, just like your favorite teddy bear hug!

Mama Teresa showed everyone that even a little act of kindness, a little smile, can make a very big difference. She taught us that sharing our love makes the world a brighter, happier place. She was so, so kind, and loved by many, big and small.

Now, sweet pea, it's time for sleepy eyes. Remember Mama Teresa's big, kind heart.

Today's Lesson: Sharing your love makes the world a happier place.
